FAQs

All the questions that have been asked at least twice.

About MD

We believe in providing high-quality resources to the design community without financial barriers. It helps us build a strong community and showcase our premium offerings.

Not at all. We believe accessible design tools elevate the entire industry, and there is always room for premium, highly specific mockups.

Yes, you are welcome to share them as long as you link back to our original page and do not host the source files directly.

Mockups.co has been integrated into our main platform to provide a unified experience for all our users.

No, you may not redistribute our mockups with your own promotional links embedded within the source files.

We occasionally post tutorials on our blog and social media. Stay tuned for educational content!

License and legals

Yes, the standard versions of these mockups are available completely for free.

You can use them for personal and commercial projects. You cannot resell them or redistribute them as your own resources.

You may use them to showcase your design work on these platforms, but you cannot sell the mockup files themselves.

Yes, commercial use is fully permitted under our standard license.

Attribution is highly appreciated but not strictly required for most projects. It helps us grow!

You can showcase the finished design, but providing the modified PSD/source file for download is not allowed.

Yes, you can use them as part of your digital media or games.

Absolutely. They are designed exactly for this purpose.

No. Selling our mockups, modified or unmodified, on stock platforms is strictly prohibited.

No, you cannot claim ownership or authorship of the original mockup files.

Requests and custom jobs

We are always open to suggestions! Feel free to send us your ideas through our contact form.

We review requests and often create mockups that appeal to a wide audience. Custom exclusive mockups require a specific commission.

We do not provide personalized modification services for free files, but our mockups are designed to be user-friendly.

Yes! We offer custom 3D modeling and mockup creation services. Please contact our sales team.

Technical Issues

Simply open the file in Photoshop (or a compatible editor), find the layer marked 'Your Design Here' or similar, double-click the Smart Object, paste your design, and save it.

Most of our mockups require Adobe Photoshop (CS6 or newer). Some may be compatible with alternatives like Photopea.

Use software like WinRAR, 7-Zip (Windows), or The Unarchiver (Mac), or use the built-in extraction tools in your OS.

If a file is missing, it may be updating or there might be a temporary server issue. Please try again later or contact support.

Ensure you are opening the file in a compatible version of Photoshop. Some features require newer versions.

Check that the download finished completely and verify you have the correct software installed.

Ensure the file isn't set to 'Read-Only' and that you have enough disk space.

Double-click the smart object layer thumbnail, place your artwork inside the new document that opens, and hit Save.

Migration from Smarty Mockups

Only the resolution - we sell regular premium options at standard sizes, but Ultra offers exceptionally high DPI and larger pixel dimensions. It is used when detail is paramount, such as large print or high-end presentations.

As part of our migration campaign, we want our users to experience the highest quality we offer, building trust and showcasing our capabilities.

Yes, you have full commercial rights to use them in projects for clients or marketing.

Absolutely. Once downloaded, you can use them as many times as you like for different projects.

Subscription keeps your license key active and ensures you are receiving the latest compliance updates.

We are integrating the shop features directly into this unified platform very soon.

Yes! We love community input. Please use the request form in your account dashboard.

OUR PARTNER

All premium assets that are on MOCKUPIDEA are secured and powered thanks to the technological partnership with our cloud providers.
